quests.name: The Restricted Stacks
quests.description: Heln needs a calibrated lodestone from a retired colleague in Thornbend to open the restricted archives. A simple errand -- but the taproom at Thornbend has conversations worth overhearing.
quests.accept_text: Heln taps a note on her desk. 'Your access has been approved from upstairs. But the resonance lock needs a calibrated lodestone. Tessaly Venn -- retired to Thornbend, half a day south -- took it with her. Bring it back and I'll open the stacks.'
quests.progress_text: Heln sighs. 'Tessaly. Thornbend. The lodestone is probably holding down grape receipts.'
quests.complete_text: Heln sets the lodestone into the frame. Something clicks -- a resonance you feel through your Kin-sense. The restricted stacks unseal. 'There. Please reshelve what you pull. The person upstairs notices.'

objectives.description: Speak with Heln about restricted access
Travel to Thornbend
Wait for Tessaly at the Vineyard Tap
Retrieve the calibrated lodestone from Tessaly
Return the lodestone to Heln

quests.name: The Long Road's Silence
quests.description: A Farborn caravan-master named Griff is searching for his missing daughter. He's paying for information. Anyone heading toward the towers should keep their eyes open.
quests.accept_text: The caravan driver shrugs. 'Griff's at the junction post, two days south. He'd talk to anyone with tower access. Just... be straight with him. He's had enough runaround.'
quests.progress_text: The road south is well-traveled. Griff's description matches the notice board at every post.
quests.complete_text: Griff studies your face for a long time. 'You've seen something. I can tell. Sit down. Tell me what you know -- or tell me what you're not willing to say. Either one is information.'

objectives.description: Travel to the Long Road junction
Speak with Griff about his missing daughter
Check the trade post notice board
Return to Spur Tower with Griff's request in mind

quests.name: The Weigh-Master's Scale
quests.description: Someone named Michele was asking about Farborn at Dry Fork Station. The clerk at Thornbend wouldn't say more. The weigh station might have answers.
quests.accept_text: The clerk stares into his drink. 'I already said more than I should have. Ask at Dry Fork. The weigh-master keeps good records. That's all I'll say.'
quests.progress_text: The road to Dry Fork crosses flat scrubland. The station is visible from a mile away -- squat stone and heavy scales.
quests.complete_text: Khadi sets down her pen. 'You're the scholar from the tower. You used your Kin-sense on me when you walked in. Don't deny it -- I felt the read.' She opens a drawer. 'Eleven inquiries. Same cutouts. Three years. Someone was shopping. I should have reported this six weeks ago. I didn't. Sit down.'

objectives.description: Travel to Dry Fork Station
Speak with the weigh-master
Use Kin-sense to read Khadi
Learn about the eleven inquiries

quests.name: The Unsigned Notes
quests.description: The eleven inquiries trace back to Spur Tower. The notes on Heln's desk. The forty-year filing system. The door at the top of the stairs. Someone has been building something in the dark for longer than you've been alive.
quests.accept_text: Heln's voice is smaller than usual. 'There's a note I found once. It wasn't meant for me. It referenced... a Farborn variable. I filed it. I didn't ask. But you're asking, and I think you should see the restricted filing index. Drawer 14, section F.'
quests.progress_text: The restricted stacks hold forty years of cross-referenced correspondence. Every document leads to the same handwriting. Every trail leads upstairs.
quests.complete_text: You stand at the bottom of the upper stairs. Kin-sense flickers -- void, then nothing, then void again. The door at the top is open. It hasn't been open in decades. Someone is waiting.

objectives.description: Search the restricted filing index, drawer 14, section F
Find the note referencing 'the Farborn variable'
Confront Sarre about Maeren's ability
Speak with Maeren about the letters
Ascend the upper stairs

quests.name: The Quiet Graft
quests.description: The door at the top of the stairs is open. Behind it sits a man who has been building something in the dark for forty years. Griff is coming. Khadi is running out of time. Sarre doesn't know. Maeren is writing a letter she might actually send. What you do now determines how this ends.
quests.progress_text: The threads are converging. Every principal is in motion. What you choose matters.
quests.complete_text: Heln looks up from her desk. She does not ask what happened upstairs. She can see it on your face. 'I'll file whatever needs filing,' she says quietly. 'That's what I do.'

objectives.description: Enter the Records Adjutant's office
Hear what Vaerix has to say
Tell Griff. Reunite father and daughter.
Give Khadi's file to the authorities.
Say nothing. Leave. Let the graft continue.
End Vaerix's project by force.
Join Vaerix. Protect the graft.
